headline: setup-toolkit-diagnose orphan check covers scripts/ and schemas/

bullets: setup-toolkit-diagnose.sh Check 8 (cleanup) now scans .claude/scripts/ and .claude/schemas/ recursively for files not listed in .claude/MANIFEST. Previous coverage was four categories (skills/agents/hooks/docs), so a script removed from MANIFEST after a previous sync stayed on disk forever without surfacing as ORPHAN. Honors .claude-toolkit-ignore. Recursive find handles nested trees (scripts/lib/, scripts/cron/, schemas/hooks/).
